title: Dorian
notes: Music by Joey Roukens (new score, performed live). Hip-hop and ballet. Based on Oscar Wilde's The Picture of Dorian Gray.
full_description: A dance thriller based on the famous book by Oscar Wilde. Following the storyline of Wilde's novel, but placed in an eccentric contemporary setting. The protagonist Dorian goes over the top in his craving for beauty and adoration, and suffers the consequences. He ends up in a downward spiral, becoming trapped in a labyrinth where he can no longer tell reality from fantasy. Ernst Meisner and Marco Gerris blend different dance styles in an exciting and immersive mix of hiphop and ballet.
ai_summary: An immersive hip-hop ballet thriller based on The Picture of Dorian Gray — following a modern-day Dorian's obsessive pursuit of youth and beauty in an eccentric contemporary setting, spiralling into a nightmare where reality and fantasy collapse.
